products.title: 10" Commuter® Pro Short -- Birch
products.description: Description: An extension of our best-selling line with slightly more structure. The Commuter® Pro Short provides the same stretch and comfort you’ve come to expect from our Commuter® Collection, but now with a bit more polish, perfect for navigating any summer schedule. Size & fit: Classic fit Features: 4-way stretch Wrinkle-releasing Front, back pockets Front zip closure with hidden clasp Shirt-stay interior gripper on waistband Zipper-secure pocket on wearer’s left Media pocket Imported Fabric & care: Commuter® Pro fabric for elevated durability and mobility Made of 57% Polyester, 43% Elasterell- p Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach, use fabric softener, or dry clean Tumble dry low If ironing, use the lowest setting

products.title: 5" Commuter® Flyweight Short -- Light Gray
products.description: Description: The short that goes. Everywhere. Our Commuter® Flyweight Short delivers ultralight, quick-drying performance in a silhouette built for the day you didn't plan. Wrinkle Release Technology handles the suitcase. Stealth zipper pocket handles your essentials. Multiple pockets handle the rest. Quick-dry fabric moves from the boat to the bar without a second thought. Comfort elastic waistband with low-profile belt loops gives you options. Light enough to pack three. Smart enough to be the only one you need. For the weekend off-grid, the flight that lands at noon, and the invitation that came this morning. Because summer days don’t wait for you to figure them out. Size & fit: 5” inseam Features: Quick-dry Wrinkle releasing Comfort elastic waistband Stealth zipper pocket Hand pockets Back pockets Low profile belt loops Front zipper, shank closure Fabric & care: Commuter® Flyweight fabric 50% Polyester, 50% Recycled Polyester Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach, use fabric softener, or dry clean Lay flat to dry Do not tumble dry

products.title: 5" Extra Mile Short - Lined -- Arctic Blue
products.description: Description: Designed to redefine your run, the Extra Mile Short’s lightweight, secure fit helps you perform at your best, mile after mile. Keep your shorts in place with seams that don't let up, a t-shirt loop for when the route heats up, and a secure zip pocket so the essentials don't fall behind. Features: Knit-covered elastic waistband with drawcord Secure zipper pocket at right T-shirt loop on back waistband Side slits for range of motion Reflective details for visibility Internal boxer brief liner GOLDFUSION® Anti-Odor Technology Fabric & care: Made of 100% Polyester Lightweight, recycled Polyester/Elastane body fabric Liner treated with GOLDFUSION® Anti-Odor Technology for more wears between washes

products.title: 5" Nomad Tech Chino Short -- Smokey Olive
products.description: Description: Forget everything you don’t like about chino shorts—stiff fabric, saggy fits, and not enough function. Description: The short version of our best-selling Commuter® Pant. We built the Commuter® Shorts with our revolutionary Flex-Knit ® fabric to provide 4-way-stretch and breathability. Our signature media pocket keeps your valuables locked down, and wrinkle resistant properties keep you looking sharp. Versatile enough to go from the golf course to a backyard bbq. Size & fit: 7” inseam to rest just above the knee For any help or advice, chat with us Features: 4-way stretch Wrinkle-releasing Media pocket Back zipper-secure pocket Gusset for comfort and mobility
Imported Fabric & care: Flex-Knit® fabric for maximum mobility Made of 57% Recycled Polyester, 43% Elastomultiester Machine wash cold with like colors, line dry Do not bleach, tumble dry, iron, dry clean or use fabric softener

products.title: 7" Commuter® Flyweight Short -- Ash Blue
products.description: Description: When the season turns up, so do you. The 7" Commuter® Flyweight Short is designed to keep pace with lighter fabric, smarter structure, and the kind of comfort that puts in the work. It wicks sweat, shakes off wrinkles, and looks sharp without the extra effort.Finished with a flat hidden waistband and a stealth zipper pocket for cards and keys, it’s the short you pack first, wear most, and never have to second guess. Size & fit: Classic fit Features: Flat, hidden elastic waistband for comfort Stealth zipper pocket for valuables Wicks away moisture Fabric & care: Commuter® Flyweight Fabric Made of 50% Polyester, 50% Recycled Polyester Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach, tumble dry, dry clean, or use fabric softener Lay flat to dry

products.title: 7" DreamState Short -- Pure Black
products.description: Description: Not every day is a max-out day. Some days are for breathing, moving slow, and letting your body catch up. The DreamState 7" Short is made for those kinds of moments. Soft, easy, and just structured enough to keep you feeling grounded. Whether you’re stretching, walking, or doing absolutely nothing, this short shows up so you can wind down. Size & fit: Classic fit 7” inseam Features: Adjustable, external drawcord waistband Two hand pockets Zipper-secure pocket for valuables Back drop-in pocket Faux fly for style GOLDFUSION® Anti-Odor Technology for more wears between washes Fabric & care: Exclusive DreamState Fabric Made of 50% Polyester, 32% Recycled Polyester and 10% TENCEL™ Lyocell and 8% Elastane Wash inside-out Machine wash warm Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low, iron low if needed

products.title: 7" Invictus Ripstop Short - Unlined -- Black
products.description: Description: Go ahead and give Invictus all you've got. Constructed with abrasion-resistant, moisture-wicking fabric, these premium shorts can withstand even your most intense workouts. And because even the tough deserve to be tender, these shorts are soft to the touch without compromising durability. Features: C0 DWR-treated for water repellency Secure zipper pocket Side vents for range of motion Knit-covered comfort waistband Adjustable drawcords Reflective logo for visibility Bonded seams Fabric & care: Made of 78% Polyamide, 22% Elastane Durable yet soft, abrasion-resistant ripstop fabric C0DWR-treated fabric for water repellency

products.title: 7" Momentum Golf Short -- Deep Sea Blue
products.description: Description: Built for the guy who never phones it in—on the course or at the clubhouse. The Momentum Golf Short features warp-knit stretch, a water-repellent finish, and low-key storage that keeps tees tight and shirts tucked. You bring the focus—it brings the follow-through. Size & fit: Classic Features: Lightweight All-way stretch C0 DWR-treated fabric for water repellency Silicone gripper on interior waistband to keep your shirt tucked in Snap button closure Two front hand pockets Two back pockets Stealth zipper-secure pocket for your valuables Imported Fabric & care: Momentum Fabric Made of 71% Polyamide, 29% Elastane Machine wash cold with like colors in a gentle cycle Tumble dry low Do not bleach, iron or dry clean

products.title: 7" Pursuit Short - Lined -- Asphalt
products.description: Description: The Pursuit Short is the evolution of our Mako Short, elevating what started it all. The same versatility and durability you know, now with lighter, all-way stretch Pursuit fabric. Held up by a flexible waistband that moves how you do, adjusted with our innovative in-or-out ties, and pockets that keep your essentials secure without weighing your shorts down. Plus a medium compression liner to keep you focused your life, not your shorts. Size & fit: Standard fit Medium compression liner Features: Innovative in-or-out drawcord for interior or exterior ties Hand pockets Stealth zipper pocket on wearer’s left Medium compression liner Drop-in pocket on liner Pillow pocket on liner Reflective Captain's Stitch logo Imported Fabric & care: Made of 71% Polyamide, 29% Elastane Pursuit fabric: Lightweight, all-way stretch, durable Machine wash cold with like colors, gentle cycle, tumble dry low Do not bleach, iron, dry clean or use fabric softener

products.title: Cotton+ Dress -- Frost Blue
products.description: Description: Cotton has always made getting dressed feel easy. The feel of it against skin, the way it looks without trying, the way it turns a simple dress into the thing you reach for first. But shape that softens by afternoon and stretch that doesn't bounce back, that's where it always fell short. The Cotton+ Dress fixes that. A luxe cotton performance blend with an A-line shape that holds through the whole day, a scoop neckline and wide shoulder straps that sit somewhere between support and ease. Hand pockets and an invisible back zipper because function matters, even here. UPF 50+ for wherever the day takes you. Soft's just the start. Finished with a subtle back opening and hidden short liner (pockets included), it’s a sport dress engineered for every activity imaginable. Size & fit: Slim, body-skimming 15” skirt length 4” short inseam Getting into your dress: Start at the top. Slip in through the neckline, pull it up, and you’re good to go. The Drive Time Polo introduces a refined new standard to your golf game, starting with an architectural semi-spread collar and finishing with details that transition from the course to your next reservation. products.title: Endure Short - Lined - 6" -- Ash Blue
products.description: Description: This is your training short, and it starts with the fabric. Endure Mini Grid is an all-way stretch mesh engineered to move in every direction you do, whether you're mid-stride, mid-rep, or pushing through the final interval. It's lightweight enough to feel like nothing's there, breathable enough to keep up with your hardest efforts, and fast-wicking enough to handle whatever you're putting in. 360° reflectivity keeps you visible on early morning or late evening runs, UPF 50+ handles the sun when you're out there midday, and GOLDFUSION® Anti-Odor Technology means it's ready for another session before you throw it in the wash. Built for the miles you're logging, the intervals you're crushing, and every training day that asks you to push just a little harder. Size & fit: 6" inseam Standard fit Features: 360° reflectivity UPF 50+ sun protection GOLDFUSION® Anti-Odor Technology Comfort knit waistband Adjustable in-or-out drawcord Two hand pockets F.I.T. products.title: Founder's Golf 1/4 Zip -- Azure Blue
products.description: Description: Your game. Your rules. The Founder's Golf 1/4 Zip is designed for those who refuse to let anything get in the way of their pursuit of perfection. Wear it on those crisp mornings when the competition is strong, and the stakes are high. With the same technical features as our Founder's Golf Hoodie, this 1/4 Zip is built for the golfer who means business. Glacier Cooling Technology keeps you cool under pressure, while the raglan sleeves and secure fit ensure a full range of motion. Wear it when you need to focus on your game, and nothing else. The Horizon Jacket is made from our exclusive Japanese linen-like fabric, the one that resists wrinkles when you stuff it in your bag, doesn't demand anything from your morning, and still looks pulled together when it matters. Deep patch pockets hold what you need. The subtle bubble hem and cuff details do the styling for you. Toss it on and go live your life. That's really it. The shirt that moves with you from the office to wherever the evening goes. Style and comfort stopped being a choice the moment this shirt existed. products.title: Revive™ Flare Legging -- Asphalt
products.description: Description: The flare’s back, and we’ve been ready. The Revive Flare Legging takes our best-selling fabric and gives it a cool girl cut that flatters, flexes, and feels good everywhere. This is disguised performance: a fit that smooths without squeezing, a subtle flare that elongates every line, and a fabric engineered to hold its shape though wear, wash, and weekend plans. Where others brought back nostalgia, we built a modern essential. Fashion-led, technically made, and endlessly versatile for your full life. The Revive Flare Legging is proof that when you get the fabric right, everything else falls into place. Size & fit: High-rise 31” inseam Features: UPF 50+ sun protection GOLDFUSION® Anti-Odor Technology Wicks away moisture Bonded seams and merrow stitching Wide double-layer soft elastic waistband Side drop-in pockets to fit most phones Imported Fabric & care: Revive™ fabric Midweight 4-way stretch Made of 81% Polyamide, 19% Elastane Machine wash cold, inside-out with like colors Tumble dry low, gentle cycle Do not steam, iron, or dry clean

products.title: 3-in-1 Functional Snow Jacket e.s.trail pure
products.description: Built to handle tough winter weather conditions, this 3-in-1 workwear snow jacket offers versatile warmth with our warmest ISOFILL® 200 synthetic filling and a removable inner layer, so you don't overheat. The jacket is also packed with plenty of smart details like the breathable ventilation zones and pockets built a bit larger to fit your gloves. We've also made sure the jacket is waterproof, windproof, and breathable with our signature dryplexx® extreme membrane, meaning all-day performance is still at the forefront. Complete the outfit with our matching snow pants for a protective winter outfit. products.title: Cargo Work Pants e.s.motion 2020
products.description: Built to get the job done, the Cargo Work Pants e.s.motion 2020 unite flexibility and durability. The Flexbelt® waistband and elasticated side elements free your movement, while CORDURA® knee zones and a triple-stitched inside leg seam ensure these pants stand up to the toughest of work. If things get strenuous, there are zipper vents on the back of both thighs. Knee pad pockets allow you to add protection only when you need it. Modern pants built to get things done Flexbelt® waistband with elasticated side elements Extra sturdy triple-stitched seam on inside leg Wide belt loops with Velcro for worker bag 2 side pockets and 2 back pockets reinforced with CORDURA® Reinforced ruler pocket and multi-compartment thigh pocket Zipper vents at the back of both thighs Knee pad pocket with Velcro fastener at the top Knee zone in durable CORDURA® Reflective details NEXT LEVEL KNEE PROTECTION Concealed top-loading knee pad pockets Perfect ergonomics: Top-loading pocket that works with all knee pads for our STRAUSS work pants. A protective flap covers the pocket opening. This prevents the knee pads from slipping and from dust and debris getting in. products.title: Carpenter Jeans e.s.iconic
products.description: A necessity in every worker’s wardrobe, these carpenter jeans come in a classic, relaxed fit and have been reinforced with triple-stitched main seams for superior durability. The slanted front pockets mean you can keep your essentials close, while the requisite hammer loop combined with a small side pocket ensure ease of access on the jobsite. The D-ring on the waistband adds an extra dose of utility, making these carpenter jeans a reliable choice when working on your craft. products.title: Chino Pants e.s.e:pic
products.description: Look sharp and perform in the e.s.e:pic Chino Pants. Made from a durable twill fabric that combines CORDURA® NYCO, T400 stretch, and cotton, they offer a refined look with the strength to handle real work. The modern tapered leg, narrow hem, and regular waist fit keep things professional, while the Flexbelt® waistband prevents pulling and the double-stitched inseam adds lasting durability. These chinos are built to move between jobsite and office without missing a beat. products.title: Double Front Multipocket Pants e.s.vintage
products.description: Tough and functional, these double front work pants are built for your life on and off the jobsite. They’re constructed with a stretchy waistband and sturdy cotton canvas blend with the perfect amount of stretch for mobility on the job. Designed with pre-shaped legs, knee pad compatibility, and multiple utility pockets (including a secure cell phone pocket), the pants combine practicality and style for all-day comfort and performance. comfortable slim fit pre-shaped leg with knee darts stretchy Flexbelt® waistband double outer fabric from thigh to calf for knee pads pads can be inserted from below top corners secured with rivets 2 back pockets 2 slit pockets: right leg ruler pocket with small patch multipocket with velcro fastener suitable for large cell phone left leg 2nd cell phone pocket 2 hammer loops (right + left next to back trouser pockets) carabiner trailer hook below right waistband loop robust canvas material with light washed effect contrasting accessories + quilting coordinated Material: 48% Cotton / 36% Elastomultiester / 16% Polyamide (approx. 9,14 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron, low heat Dry cleaning any solvent, normal cycle

products.title: Double Front Ripstop Cargo Work Pants e.s.e:pic
products.description: These double front pants are cut to a relaxed, looser fit and made from a lightweight ripstop material that's surprisingly tough. The combination of breathable fabric and ease of movement makes them ideal for warm-weather work. They feature plenty of pocket storage and knee-pad pockets designed to accept STRAUSS knee pads – perfect for jobs where you must occasionally work from the floor. relaxed fit made from a modern ripstop fabric Flexbelt ® waistband double layer knees has an opening at the bottom for a knee pad that can be closed with a hook-and-loop fastener, and a small flap on the opening fixes the knee pad in place 2 rounded pockets with reinforcement, additional coin pocket on the right, zip pocket on the left hidden pockets on both sides for attaching a tape measure and knife with a clip 2 back pockets, one of which a flap and snap fastener can be closed both back pockets have a hammer loop on the side thin, ruler pocket on the right leg with reinforced opening edge ruler pocket has a ventilation pocket with a zip and mesh lining cell phone pocket red STRAUSS silicon label in the corner of the cell phone pocket all pocket flaps have a firm insert that gives the flaps strong hold D-ring next to the first belt loop on the right side triple-stitched inner leg seam Material: Shell 50% Polyamide / 48% Cotton / 2% Elastane (approx. 6,34 oz/sq yard) Care instructions: Machine wash warm 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Normal tumble dry (low temperature) Iron low heat Do not Dryclean
products.material: Shell 50% Polyamide / 48% Cotton / 2% Elastane (approx. 6,34 oz/sq yard)

products.title: Double Front Work Pants e.s.iconic
products.description: STRAUSS has taken the classic double front work pants and re-engineered it for modern workers. The pants come in a relaxed fit, and the traditional cotton fabric contains a bit of elastane, so the pants retain a casual look but with a little more comfort thanks to the added stretch. For durability, heavy wear-and-tear areas have been reinforced with triple seams, and CORDURA® reinforcements are on each pocket, the back hem, and from the thigh to the calf for the knee pad inserts. When it comes to utility, these pants feature hidden pockets on both sides for attaching a tape measure and knife with a clip. The square side pockets are perfect for extra storage and easily accessable when crouching. For workers often on their knees, the knee pad inserts and sturdy double front structure will keep you protected on the jobsite. classic relaxed fit work pants with stretch fabric featuring knee-shaping darts additional CORDURA® reinforcement from thigh to calf for knee pads insertable from below 2 square front pockets with CORDURA® reinforcement additional coin pocket on the right hidden pockets on both sides for attaching a tape measure and knife with clip 2 back pockets with contrasting CORDURA® fabric at the bottom and on the openings left rear leg pocket up to the side seam made of CORDURA® fabric hammer loop ruler pocket with contrasting CORDURA® fabric in the lower area CORDURA® reinforcement on the back hem of the trousers D-ring on the 1st right waistband loop triple stitched main seams Material: 1. Shell: 98% Cotton / 2% Elastane (approx. 10,91 oz/sq yard) 2. Shell: 100% Polyamide (approx. 10,18 oz/sq yard) Care instructions: Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Warm, iron Do not dry clean

products.description: This lightweight jacket has heavyweight ambition. The inside made of a light mesh, while the outer shell has a breathable, water-repellent membrane. products.description: Sturdy and useful, these canvas shorts will stand up to the toughest tests and come with enough pocket storage to carry just about everything. products.title: Multipocket Work Bib Overalls e.s.vintage
products.description: Old-school aesthetics meets modern functionality in these hard-working, vintage-looking bib overalls. Designed with a relaxed fit and straight legs, the bib is built with a robust, light-washed canvas cotton material with extra stretch to keep you comfortable and mobile in the job. Practical details include the elastic waistband, side-seam zipper, multiple utility pockets, dual hammer loops, and hem zippers. All these combine for some overalls that perform when you need them. comfortable relaxed fit straight leg elastic waistband with Velcro width adjusters left side-seam with zipper for ease getting dressed/undressed 2 back pockets 2 slit pockets right front coin pocket left front zip pocket right leg ruler pocket with small patch multipocket with Velcro fastener suitable for large cell phone second cell phone pocket on left leg 2 hammer loops (right + left next to back pockets) 2 outer leg zippers on the hem carabiner trailer hook below right waistband loop robust canvas material with light washed effect contrasting accessories + quilting coordinated rivets to secure front pockets front bib: Large pocket with flap and Velcro fastener, zipper pocket, 2 multipockets straps: Length-adjustable button and metal clasp with metal buckle, elastic insert on the back for added comfort when moving and bending Material: 48% Cotton / 36% Elastomultiester / 16% Polyamide (approx. 9.14 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron, low heat Dry cleaning any solvent, normal cycle

products.title: Multipocket Work Pants e.s.vintage
products.description: Tackle your tasks in true comfort and style with these multipocket work pants. With an old-school look but modern functionality, the pants are built with a stretchy Flexbelt® waistband and contain a middleweight cotton canvas material blended with some extra elastic for comfort and mobility. The pants include multiple utility pockets and dual hammer loops to help you perform on the job. The riveted front pockets also add an extra dose of durability. The e.s.vintage multipocket work pants are an ultimate piece of workwear…or casual wear. comfortable slim fit straight leg stretchy Flexbelt ® waistband 2 back pockets 2 slit pockets right front coin pocket left front zip pocket right leg ruler pocket with small attached multipocket with Velcro fastener suitable for large cell phone left leg 2nd cell phone pocket 2 hammer loops (right + left next to rear trouser pockets) carabiner hook below right waistband loop robust canvas material with a light washed effect contrasting accessories + quilting coordinated rivets to secure the front trouser pockets Material: 48% Cotton / 36% Elastomultiester / 16% Polyamide (approx. 9.14 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron, low heat Dry cleaning any solvent, normal cycle

products.title: Pocket-Protected Work Pants e.s.iconic
products.description: No more holes. No more frayed seams. These pocket protected pants are perfect for those who keep their gear close at hand. Designed for durability, these work pants feature a relaxed fit, triple-stitched main seams, and pre-shaped knee darts with knee pad pockets for added protection. The key to these pants is in the pockets — each one is reinforced with 100% polyamide, ensuring they withstand the toughest tasks. Relaxed-fit work pants with a stretchy construction Pre-shaped knees with darts for improved flexibility Knee pad pockets with reinforced fabric extending to the hem, secured with a hook-and-loop flap closure 2 square pockets at the front with a reinforced fabric, additional coin pocket on the right, zip pocket on the left, and hidden pockets on both sides for attaching a tape measure and knife with clip 2 back pockets with contrasting fabric reinforcements at the bottom and on the pocket openings Left back leg pocket up to the side seam with additional reinforced fabric Hammer loop Thin ruler pocket with contrasting reinforcements in the lower area and on the opening edge Reinforced fabric on the back trouser hem D-ring on the first right belt loop Triple-stitched main seams for maximum durability NEXT LEVEL KNEE PROTECTION Concealed, top-loading knee pad pockets Perfect ergonomics: Top-loading pocket that works with all knee pads for our STRAUSS work pants. A protective flap covers the pocket opening. This prevents the knee pads from slipping and from dust and debris getting in. Material: First shell: 98 % Cotton /2 % Elastane (approx. 10.91 oz/sq yard ) Second shell: 100% Polyamide (approx. 10.18 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron on low heat Do not dry clean
products.material: shell: 98 % Cotton /2 % Elastane (approx. 10.91 oz/sq yard ) Second shell: 100% Polyamide (approx. 10.18 oz/sq yard )

products.title: Power Denim 5-Pocket Jeans
products.description: Unmatched durability meets unmatched comfort in the Power Denim 5-Pocket Jeans. Crafted from ultra-tough Dyneema® fibers and US cotton, they're lightweight yet incredibly tear-resistant. These jeans feature 4-way stretch, a Flexbelt® waistband for all-day ease, and reinforced seams that add to the sturdiness. With tool-ready details like hidden clip pockets, double hammer loops, and a painter loop, plus a modern stone washed or black-washed finish, they combine rugged performance with a sleek, utility-focused fit. Considered the “world’s strongest fiber™,” Dyneema® is an ultra-lightweight, high-strength fiber that has been proven to be 15 times stronger than steel. Originally developed for military and ballistic applications, the material’s exceptional strength-to-weight ratio, tear resistance, and abrasion resistance combine to provide unparalleled durability without compromising on comfort or flexibility. When blended with traditional cotton, you get a denim that enables you to move faster for longer, making you more tactical on the job—without sacrificing on protection. Regular fit Flexbelt® waistband Straight leg Regular hem 2 angled front pockets with black narrow piping at entries Hidden clip tool pockets at each front pocket 2 angled back pockets 2 hammer loops Stylish diagonal seams from back pockets towards outseams Inseam and outseam secured with single top stitching Double top stitching seam at rear for durability Material: Stonewashed: Shell 67 % Cotton / 23 % Polyester / 6% Polyethylene / 3% Elastolefin / 1% Elastane (approx. 10.74 oz/sq yard) Blackwashed: Shell 63 % Cotton / 25 % Polyester / 6% Polyethylene / 5% Elastolefin / 1% Elastane (approx. 11.00 oz/sq yard) Care Instructions: Machine wash warm 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Normal tumble dry, low temperature Iron Medium heat Do not dryclean
products.material: Shell 67 % Cotton / 23 % Polyester / 6% Polyethylene / 3% Elastolefin / 1% Elastane (approx. 10.74 oz/sq yard) Blackwashed: Shell 63 % Cotton / 25 % Polyester / 6% Polyethylene / 5% Elastolefin / 1% Elastane (approx. 11.00 oz/sq yard)

products.title: Ripstop Cargo Work Pants e.s.e:pic
products.description: Look sharper. Perform better. Keep cooler. These ripstop cargo pants may be lightweight and flexible, but they’re unapologetically heavy-duty and breathable. Elastic Flexbelt® waistband Darted knees for freedom of movement Secure knee pad pockets Comfortable, mesh-lined interior knee pocket 2 rounded reinforced slash pockets Integrated coin pocket within the right slash pocket Zip pocket on the left side Side pockets on each thigh for attaching a tape measure and knife 2 back welt pockets, one with a flap and snap fastener 2 side pockets on the back with a hammer loop Knife pocket on the right leg with reinforced opening Secure cell phone pocket Deep cargo pocket on the left leg with an internal cell phone pocket and secondary zip pocket All pocket flaps have a firm insert to strengthen the hold D-ring next to the first belt loop on the right side Triple-stitched seams on the inner leg Why we made it: The industry standards for hot weather, heavy-duty work pants wasn’t quite cutting it for some of our customers, so we went out and re-engineered a classic. The Ripstop Cargo Work Pants e.s.e:pic combine the signature toughness of cotton duck work pants but with a more lightweight, breathable ripstop fabric that’s just as strong but much more comfortable on hot days. The triple-stitched seams, reinforced knees, and utility pockets provide necessary support when the job gets tough. And the sharp, polished fit has you looking professional everywhere you go. Material: The fabric was engineered to be unbelievably lightweight, breathable, and tear-resistant but with a bit of stretch to prevent any tugging—allowing you to work with ease. Shell 50% Polyamide / 48% Cotton / 2% Elastane (approx. 6.34 oz/sq yard) Size and fit: A comfortable, relaxed fit with a medium rise on the waist Straight cut legs for a more polished look on site The Flexbelt® waistband expands with you as you move on the job Darted knees provide extra freedom of movement Elastic fabric offers plenty of stretch, perfect for active job sites. Care instructions: Machine-wash at warm: 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry on low temperature Iron on low heat Do not dry clean
products.material: Shell 50% Polyamide / 48% Cotton / 2% Elastane (approx. 6.34 oz/sq yard)

products.title: Seamless Tee e.s.trail pure
products.description: The Seamless Tee e.s.trail pure is an ultra-light base layer built for high-output work or sports. Its ultra-stretch, close-to-skin fit moves with you, while targeted ventilation zones and moisture-wicking fabric keep you cool and dry. The nearly seamless design eliminates pressure points, ensuring lasting comfort under layers or on its own. Ultra-light, highly elastic functional shirt Almost seamless finish for no pressure points or irritations on the skin Soft-falling high-performance fabric Breathable and quick-drying fabric Ventilation zones promote moisture transport Crew neck Short sleeves Material: 72% Polyester / 28% Polyamide (approx. 4,51 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash warm 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not iron Do not Dryclean

products.title: STRAUSS X 1620 Multipocket Pants
products.description: Guaranteed for Life. STRAUSS has joined forces with 1620 Workwear for a limited-edition collection of highly technical, “Made in the USA” work pants, exclusively available in the US at STRAUSS.com. The pants are specifically designed for master craftsmen and those in the trades, with purposeful pocket placements that add utility and help you on the job. This feature-rich upgrade of the iconic American utility pant is constructed with 1620’s new lightweight Stretch NYCO twill that is homegrown, technical, tactical, and flexible, so it'll stand up to whatever your job throws at you. STRAUSS’ signature Flexbelt® adds extra comfort and prevents the pants from pulling and clinging as you stretch and bend. 1620 Lifetime Guarantee Comfortable fit thanks to Flexbelt® waistband Straight leg 2 front pockets with CORDURA® reinforcement and "clip pockets" for a pocket tape measure or knife Money pockets with space for a cell phone on both sides 2 ruler pockets (on the right and left sides) beneath the back pockets 2 large patch back pockets 2 additional seam pockets in the back yoke seam 2 hammer loops The bar tack of the gray version comes tone-in-tone, and the black version comes with contrasting STRAUSS red stitching Exclusively Available in the US at STRAUSS.com Material: Shell 59% Cotton /37 % Polyamide/4% Elastane (approx. 8.26 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 86 °F / 30 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron low heat Do not dryclean
products.material: Shell 59% Cotton /37 % Polyamide/4% Elastane (approx. 8.26 oz/sq yard )

STRAUSS’ signature Flexbelt® adds extra comfort and prevents the pants from pulling and clinging as you stretch and bend. 1620 Lifetime Guarantee Comfortable fit thanks to Flexbelt® waistband Straight leg 2 front pockets with CORDURA® reinforcement and "clip pockets" for a pocket tape measure or knife Money pockets with space for a cell phone on both sides 2 ruler pockets (on the right and left sides) beneath the back pockets 2 large patch back pockets 2 additional seam pockets in the back yoke seam 2 hammer loops The bar tack of the gray version comes tone-in-tone, and the black version comes with contrasting STRAUSS red stitching Exclusively Available in the US at STRAUSS.com Material: Shell 59% Cotton /37 % Polyamide/4% Elastane (approx. 8.26 oz/sq yard ) Care instructions: Machine wash 86 °F / 30 °C Do not bleach Tumble dry, low temperature Iron low heat Do not dryclean

products.title: Stretch Ripstop Cargo Work Bib Overall e.s.t:aktik
products.description: Lighter, more durable, and more comfortable than your old-school work bib, this version is about straight-up performance when the weather gets hot. With design inspiration from the ranch life, these have been revamped with an ultra-lightweight ripstop fabric that stretches, breathes, and withstands abrasion and wear. The reinforced seams and pockets provide an extra dose of reliability and utility when you’re putting them to the test. Gear up knowing you’ll be cool, calm, and protected when you get to work. Classic fit Straight cut Elastic waistband with adjustable side gussets for comfort Lightweight, stretch performance ripstop fabric 2 square pockets with reinforcement, additional zip pocket on the left side Integrated hidden pockets on each side for attaching a tape measure or knife with a clip 2 back pockets both with a flap closure 2 side cargo pockets with a flap closure Adjustable hem with elastic cord and stopper Front bib: Large pocket with flap and hook-and-loop fastener Flexible straps with length-adjustable buckle Reinforced seams with single topstitching Material: Shell 96% Polyamide / 4% Elastan (approx. 4.60 oz/sq yard) Care instructions: Machine wash warm 104 °F / 40 °C Do not bleach Normal tumble dry (low temperature) Iron low heat Do not dry clean

products.title: Windbreaker light-pack e.s.trail
products.description: This e.s.trail windbreaker is the ultimate lightweight jacket. You can easily fold and stow the entire jacket into the hood, making it perfect for working in unpredictable weather. Like most windbreakers, the jacket keeps out the wind, and the taped seams and inner membrane prevent water penetration. That said, we've developed this jacket with a technical construction so that, even though the seams are sealed, the jacket retains a high level of breathability, so you don't overheat. It’s perfect for tough, rainy days at work, and, when you don't need it anymore, just fold it up into the hood. products.title: Women's Double Front Ripstop Cargo Work Pants e.s.e:pic
products.description: A perfect match in design and functionality, these work pants are cut to a looser, relaxed fit and are built for a wide range of environments where you'd like peak performance but with a more traditional work look. The ripstop fabric is extra lightweight and durable compared to your standard canvas work pants. The Flexbelt® waistband moves with you while you work. The pants also feature an extra layer on the front for improved durability as well as knee-pad pockets for the STRAUSS knee pads.
